text:
is a military operation featured in the Rebuild of Evangelion film series. It occurs in the beginning of Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time film.

History

Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time

This operation is enacted by WILLE to retrieve components from Euro-NERV and restore Paris. A team is sent from Wunder to the sealing pillar consisting of Ritsuko Akagi, Maya Ibuki, 3 WILLE underlings, Mari Makinami Illustrious and Evangelion Unit-08β.

During the mission they are attacked by a swarm of Evangelion Mark.44A, Mari intercepts and destroys all units eventually revealing Evangelion Mark.4444C and various Evangelion Mark.44B. The fleet defending the hacking team is easily destroyed in the first shot of the Mark.4444C. Mari uses the fallen Eiffel Tower to pierce into Mark.4444C destroying all Mark.44B and Mark.4444C in the process. Later the Sealing Pillar is reactivated and restores Paris and Euro-NERV is reactivated revealing components to JA-02 and equipment to refit the damaged Evangelion units from WILLE.

Participants

WILLE
Evangelion Unit-08β
Ritsuko Akagi
Maya Ibuki
Mari Makinami Illustrious

NERV
Evangelion Mark.44A
Evangelion Mark.44B
Evangelion Mark.4444C
